signals.headline: US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
A two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran has been announced, easing geopolitical tensions and boosting risk appetite, with Bitcoin climbing to $72,000, Ethereum to $2,200 (rallying over 6% weekly and closing above key resistance), and XRP to $1.38 (up 4.35% daily after $1.30 support).[4]  
This resolution directly counters prior
